episodes.title: The Rise and Fall of Nature Boy | My Thoughts on the Documentary
episodes.description:
The documentary on Nature Boy dives into one of the internet's most controversial cult leaders and explores the rise, influence, and allegations surrounding his community. In this video, I share my thoughts, reactions, and review of the documentary, including what stood out to me, the most shocking moments, and whether I think it's worth watching. If you're interested in cult documentaries, true crime, and stories about social media influence gone wrong, this discussion is for you.
What did you think of the documentary? Let me know your thoughts in the comments!

#NatureBoy #CultDocumentary #DocumentaryReview #TrueCrime #Cults #YouTubeReview #ReactionVideo #DocumentaryDiscussion
